title: pleopeltis costulata
intro: Pleopeltis costulata, also known as the costulate polypody, is a species of epiphytic fern native to Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Pleopeltis costulata include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizomes are typically dried and used to make teas or infusions, and it can also be used topically as a poultice to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
